title: brachanthemum pulvinatum
intro: Brachanthemum pulvinatum, also known as the false oxtongue, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Brachanthemum pulvinatum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
